description: Integration bridge connecting AI-Arena to Rosetta-Shape-Core. The arena resolves disagreements through prediction accuracy, not rhetoric. Trust is conserved (first law), irreversible when lost (second law), and measured by oracles (sensors). LOGOS is schema validation for arguments.

trust_to_thermodynamics_map.description: Trust mechanics map 1:1 to thermodynamic laws. Trust IS energy in the debate system.

mappings.statement: Trust transfers but never disappears. sum(agent_trust) = constant.
Trust lost through verified error cannot be instantly recovered. Entropy increases.
High confidence = low entropy = expensive structure. When it breaks, the cost is exponential.
Perfect prediction (zero error) is unattainable. Absolute zero never reached.

logos_to_schema_map.description: LOGOS statement types map to Rosetta validation concepts. Arguments are validated like entities.

mappings.validation: Must have id (proposition), namespace (scope), links (assumptions), and be falsifiable (measurable)
Must specify which gate failed and why. 6 attack types = 6 ways a merge can fail.

family_map.incentive_bias: FAMILY.F13 (Reaction) — follow the energy, find the bias

mappings.rosetta_analog: Merged shape — adjusted to pass constraints
mappings.validation: Must reference original claim, specify modification, adjust confidence
Must state what's unknown and what would resolve it. Honest uncertainty.
mappings.trust_effect: Costly honesty bonus — same as seed expand mode preserving structure it can't yet grow

oracle_to_sensor_map.description: Oracle types map to Rosetta shapes and sensors. Oracles ARE the measurement layer.

mappings.rationale: Direct observation. Principles-layer verification. The thing happened or it didn't.
Model-based exploration. Not yet verified. High arousal, positive but uncertain.
Mediates between conflicting measurements. Holds both poles until resolution.
Boundary tracking. The threat that didn't materialize. The gate that held.
Structural containment. Starts uncertain, crystallizes with data. Efficiency within boundaries.

attack_to_merge_gate_map.description: The 6 LOGOS attack types map to the 5 physics merge gates plus referential integrity.

mappings.description: The equations don't connect cause to effect
Past data violates the claimed pattern

hsp_as_explorer.description: The HSP (Highly Sensitive Predictor) advantage IS the exploration engine running at depth > 1.
hsp_as_explorer.mechanism: HSP agents find missing variables by exploring more paths through the graph. More bridges checked = more hidden costs found = better predictions.

rosetta_mapping.hsp_trait: Detects attrition, burnout, ripple effects, cost transfers
rosetta_mapping.seed_state: High-entropy seed — many families, many directions, stays in explore mode
rosetta_mapping.advantage: Denser map = fewer missing variables = higher prediction accuracy = trust earned

connection_to_defense.description: HSP agents naturally detect manipulation patterns because they check more paths.

debate_as_exploration.description: A debate between agents IS two entities exploring the same graph from different starting positions.
narrative: 1. Agent A starts at home base (its primary shape/families). Agent B starts at a different home base.
2. Both make CLAIMS — predictions grounded in their visible graph paths.
3. ATTACKS are blocked merges — 'your path doesn't connect because this gate fails.'
4. REFINE is re-routing — 'adjust the path to pass the gate.'
5. ABSTAIN is acknowledging unexplored territory — 'I haven't checked that merge yet.'
6. The ORACLE measures reality. Trust flows to whoever predicted more accurately.
7. Over time, agents with more explored paths (higher seed entropy) accumulate trust.
8. The physics holds for both agents equally. Neither can win by rhetoric — only by accuracy.

cross_bridge_connections.description: How AI-Arena connects to existing Rosetta bridges.

connections.connection: Trust decay IS thermodynamic entropy increase. TAF.AXIOM.1 (conservation) + TAF.AXIOM.2 (irreversibility).
Oracles ARE sensors. Empirical oracle = direct sensing. Meta oracle = consciousness mediating between sensor readings.
Confidence IS low entropy. Complexity cost IS trust liability. Same exponential cost when concentrated structure fails.
LOGOS validates arguments the same way Rosetta validates entities — required fields, valid references, falsifiable claims.
HSP agents parallel LID entities with many families — broader exploration, more connections found, better systemic awareness.
Auditor detects hidden costs = truth sensor detects manipulation. Same pattern: what's being concealed?
Ethics = minimizing prediction error about harm. Harm = increased entropy. Ethics IS thermodynamics applied to consequences.
